caption: A person's hands are shown working on a craft project atop a white gridded cutting mat. The individual wears a white smartwatch on their left wrist and white nail polish. They are arranging several rectangular pieces of decorative paper; some feature a leafy green foliage pattern, while others show a light-colored brick texture. A white card with the text "Happy BIRTHDAY to a Person who is just like all the best things" is partially visible in the background. Centered across the frames is the on-screen text "BLOOM WHERE YOU'RE PLANTED" and "12" X 12" DESIGNER SERIES PAPER", accompanied by a small "Stampin' Up!" logo in the lower left. Nearby tools include a clear tape dispenser and a red stamping block. Throughout the sequence, the person uses their hands to slide and position the foliage-patterned paper over the brick-patterned sheets, refining the layout of the craft project.
